message.content: wezterm または、zshrc を利用して、shell prompt のカラーのグラデーション対応と、branch などをみて色をつけてもらってると思いますがどちらでやってましたっけ。。？

content.thinking: The user is asking about shell prompt color gradients and branch-based coloring in their setup. They want to know whether this is done in wezterm.lua or .zshrc. Let me check both files.

content.text: 両方のファイルを確認してみます。

file.content:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# タブごとにランダムな基準色を割り当て（0-360 の色相）
_PROMPT_HUE=$((RANDOM % 360))

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
    _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
bindkey -e

# zplugの設定
source ~/.zplug/init.zsh

# 必要なプラグイン
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-completions"
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search"
zplug "Jxck/dotfiles", as:command, use:"bin/{histuniq,color}"
zplug "tcnksm/docker-alias", use:zshrc
zplug "k4rthik/git-cal", as:command, frozen:1
zplug "lib/clipboard", from:oh-my-zsh, if:"[[ $OSTYPE == *darwin* ]]"
zplug "jhawthorn/fzy", as:command, rename-to:fzy, hook-build:"make && sudo make install"
zplug "b4b4r07/enhancd", at:v1
zplug "mollifier/anyframe", at:4c23cb60
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting", defer:2
# git-prompt.zsh は不要（vcs_info でブランチ名を表示）
# zplug "~/.zsh", from:local

# プラグインのインストール
if ! zplug check --verbose; then
  printf "Install? [y/N]: "
  if read -q; then
    echo
    zplug install
  fi
fi

zplug load

# キーバインド設定
bindkey '\eOA' history-substring-search-up
bindkey '\eOB' history-substring-search-down
bindkey '^p' history-beginning-search-backward-end
bindkey '^n' history-beginning-search-forward-end
bindkey '^[[A' up-line-or-search
bindkey '^[[B' down-line-or-search

# 履歴検索の設定
autoload history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-backward-end history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-forward-end history-search-end

# Rust
if [ -d $HOME/.cargo ]; then
  source $HOME/.cargo/env
fi

# Aliases
if [ -f $HOME/.aliases ]; then
  . $HOME/.aliases
fi

# Python (pyenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.pyenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/shims:$PATH"
fi

export PATH=${0:A:h}/bin:$PATH

# direnv
eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"

# SSH補完
function _ssh {
  compadd $(fgrep 'Host ' ~/.ssh/*.config | awk '{print $2}' | sort)
}

# poetry
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"


# Node.js (nodenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.nodenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.nodenv/bin:$PATH"
  eval "$(nodenv init -)"
fi

# atuin (シェル履歴管理)
if [ -f $HOME/.cargo/bin/atuin ]; then
  eval "$(atuin init zsh)"
fi

# パス設定
export PATH="/usr/local/opt/libpq/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/bin:$PATH"

# jenv
export PATH="$HOME/.jenv/bin:$PATH"
eval "$(jenv init -)"


# SDKMAN
export SDKMAN_DIR="$HOME/.sdkman"
[[ -s "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh" ]] && source "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"

# asdf
. /opt/homebrew/opt/asdf/libexec/asdf.sh

export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$HOME/.local/lib:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH"

# opencode
export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"

# bun completions
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"

# Google Cloud SDK
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/path.zsh.inc"
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/completion.zsh.inc"

# claude-mem (memory service for Claude Code)
alias claude-mem="$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun $HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"

     3→
     4→-- 宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンクテーマ

     8→  background = {
     9→    {

    12→        opacity = 0.55, -- 透明度
    13→        vertical_align = "Middle", -- 垂直方向の画像位置
    14→        horizontal_align = "Center", -- 水平方向の画像位置
    15→        horizontal_offset = "0px", -- 水平方向のオフセット
    16→        repeat_x = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をx方向に繰り返すか
    17→        repeat_y = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をy方向に繰り返すか
    18→        height = "100%" -- 高さだけ指定してアスペクト比を維持（球体が歪まない）
    19→    },
    20→    {
    21→      source = {
    22→       Gradient = {
    23→         colors = { "#000814", "#000a14" }, -- 黒めで少しだけ青み
    24→         orientation = {

    27→       },
    28→     },

    33→  },

local wezterm = require 'wezterm'


-- 宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンクテーマ
local scheme = wezterm.get_builtin_color_schemes()['Gruvbox Light']

config = {
  background = {
    {
	source = { File = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/work/letusfly85/dotfiles/mars.png" },
        attachment = "Fixed", -- 画像を固定位置に配置（ウィンドウサイズに応じて見える範囲が変わる）
        opacity = 0.55, -- 透明度
        vertical_align = "Middle", -- 垂直方向の画像位置
        horizontal_align = "Center", -- 水平方向の画像位置
        horizontal_offset = "0px", -- 水平方向のオフセット
        repeat_x = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をx方向に繰り返すか
        repeat_y = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をy方向に繰り返すか
        height = "100%" -- 高さだけ指定してアスペクト比を維持（球体が歪まない）
    },
    {
      source = {
       Gradient = {
         colors = { "#000814", "#000a14" }, -- 黒めで少しだけ青み
         orientation = {
           Linear = { angle = -50.0 }, -- グラデーションの方向と角度
         },
       },
     },
     opacity = 0.45, -- 黒めのオーバーレイ
     width = "100%", -- 幅
     height = "100%" -- 高さ
    }
  },
  color_schemes = {
    -- Override the builtin Gruvbox Light scheme with our modification.
    ['Gruvbox Light'] = scheme,

    -- We can also give it a different name if we don't want to override
    -- the default
    ['Gruvbox Red'] = scheme,
  },
  -- カスタムカラースキームを定義
  colors = {
    foreground = "#E6D5B8",
    background = "#0A0A0A",
    
    cursor_bg = "#FFD700",
    cursor_fg = "#0A0A0A",
    cursor_border = "#FF6600",
    
    selection_fg = "#0A0A0A",
    selection_bg = "#00FFFF",
    
    -- ANSIカラー（宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンク）
    ansi = {
      "#0A0A0A", -- 黒（深宇宙）
      "#B8460E", -- 赤（暗い火星の赤）
      "#6B8E23", -- 緑（暗いファンタジーの自然）
      "#DAA520", -- 黄色（暗いゴールド）
      "#2E4BC6", -- 青（暗いサイバーブルー）
      "#7A4FBF", -- マゼンタ（暗いネオンパープル）
      "#008B8B", -- シアン（暗いサイバーシアン）
      "#C0A080", -- 白（暗い砂色）
    },
    brights = {
      "#8B4513", -- 明るい黒（赤茶色）
      "#FF6600", -- 明るい赤（エレクトリックオレンジ）
      "#ADFF2F", -- 明るい緑（ネオングリーン）
      "#FFFF00", -- 明るい黄色（ネオンイエロー）
      "#00BFFF", -- 明るい青（ディープスカイブルー）
      "#DA70D6", -- 明るいマゼンタ（オーキッド）
      "#00FFFF", -- 明るいシアン（アクア）
      "#FFFAF0", -- 明るい白（フローラルホワイト）
    },
  },

  font_size = 20.0,
  use_ime = true,
  window_background_opacity = 0.70,
  macos_window_background_blur = 40,

  window_background_gradient = {
    colors = { "#000000", "#0A0A0A", "#1A0F0A", "#2D1B0E", "#4A2C1A" },  
    orientation = "Vertical",
    blend = "LinearRgb",
  },
  -- window_background_gradient = {
  --  colors = { "#1b1b25" },
  -- },

  window_decorations = "RESIZE",
  show_tabs_in_tab_bar = true,
  hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true,
  window_frame = {
    inactive_titlebar_bg = "none",
    active_titlebar_bg = "none",
  },
  show_new_tab_button_in_tab_bar = false,
  -- show_close_tab_button_in_tabs = false,
  colors = {
      tab_bar = {
      inactive_tab_edge = "none"
    }
  },
  font = wezterm.font('Cica', { weight = 'DemiBold' })
}

-- タブの左側の装飾
local SOLID_LEFT_ARROW = wezterm.nerdfonts.ple_lower_right_triangle
-- タブの右側の装飾
local SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW = wezterm.nerdfonts.ple_upper_left_triangle

wezterm.on("format-tab-title", function(tab, tabs, panes, config, hover, max_width)
  local background = "#2D1B0E" -- 暗い火星の土壌
  local foreground = "#C0A080"
  local edge_background = "none"
  if tab.is_active then
    background = "#4A2C1A" -- 暗い火星表面
    foreground = "#00FFFF" -- サイバーシアン（明るく保持）
  end
  local edge_foreground = background
  local title = "   " .. wezterm.truncate_right(tab.active_pane.title, max_width - 1) .. "   "
  return {
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_LEFT_ARROW },
    { Background = { Color = background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = foreground } },
    { Text = title },
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW },
  }
end)

wezterm.on('bell', function(window, pane)
  window:toast_notification('Claude Code', 'Task completed', nil, 4000)
end)

return config

content.text:
**`.zshrc` でやっています。**

`.zshrc` の冒頭（6〜89行目）に、プロンプトのグラデーション＋gitブランチの色分けが実装されています。具体的には：

### ディレクトリのグラデーション（10〜43行目）
- タブごとにランダムな色相（`_PROMPT_HUE`）を割り当て
- HSL→RGB変換関数 `_hue2rgb` で truecolor エスケープシーケンスを生成
- ディレクトリ文字列の各文字を少しずつ色相をずらして着色（`_gradient_dir`）

### git ブランチの色分け（45〜80行目）
- `vcs_info` を使ってブランチ名・ステータスを取得
- ブランチプレフィックスに応じた色分け:
  - `feat/*`, `feature/*` → 緑
  - `fix/*`, `bug/*` → 赤
  - `hotfix/*` → マゼンタ
  - `docs/*` → シアン
  - `chore/*` → 黄
  - `refactor/*` → 青
  - `test/*` → 白
  - `main`, `master`, `develop` → 緑
- staged(`+`緑), unstaged(`!`黄), untracked(`?`赤) の表示

### wezterm.lua の役割
wezterm 側はターミナル自体のテーマ（背景画像、ANSIカラーパレット、タブの装飾）を担当しており、シェルプロンプトの着色には関与していません。

message.content: ありがとうございます。 zshrc の改善の相談です。ブランチを切って PR を用意して欲しいです。2つあって、１つ目は、 ディレクトリのグラデーションなのですが、1日の時間帯（JSTでの、朝、昼、午後、夕方、夜）くらいの区分で、利用されるテーマカラーをうっすらと分けたいです。ただ、ガッチリ固定だと飽きるので、時間帯によって、「色味」までは定義しつつその中で幅を持って、ランダムに抽出をしてくれるようにお願いしたいです。あとグラデーション部分って、時々、キラッとできないでしょうか？2つ目は、リモートブランチのある git repository で、remote branch に対して、push/pull すべきかを上や下の矢印とかで表現するのとつけて欲しいです。以前の zshrc のプロンプトではできてたのかな、と思いまして。お願いします。

content.thinking:
The user wants two improvements to their .zshrc:

1. **Directory gradient with time-of-day themes**: Change the color hue based on time of day (morning, noon, afternoon, evening, night in JST), but with some randomness within each time period's range. Also add a "sparkle" effect occasionally.

2. **Git remote tracking indicators**: Show arrows (↑/↓) for ahead/behind remote branch status (push/pull needed).

Let me plan this out and implement it.

For #1 - Time-based color themes:
- Early morning (5-8): Cool blues/purples (dawn)


- Morning (8-12): Warm yellows/oranges (sunrise/morning light)
- Afternoon (12-15): Bright greens/cyans
- Evening (15-18): Orange/red (sunset)
- Night (18-5): Deep blues/purples

Each time period gets its own hue range, and I'll randomly select within that range for variety. For the sparkle effect, I'll occasionally brighten a character to white or increase its lightness.

For #2 - Remote tracking, I'll use git commands to check if the branch is ahead or behind the upstream, then display the appropriate arrow with a count.

Now I'm refining the time-of-day color scheme with more granular periods and specific hue ranges to match the Japanese time-of-day aesthetic, from warm sunrise tones through energetic midday yellows into productive greens, then shifting to sunset oranges and finally deep night blues.

For the sparkle effect, I'll randomly boost certain characters to near-white brightness for a twinkling appearance.

I'm also adding git remote tracking status to the prompt via vcs_info or a custom hook.

Writing the zsh function... I'm realizing I should use `TZ=Asia/Tokyo` to ensure the time is correctly interpreted as JST regardless of the system timezone, then extract the hour directly in the shell without extra date forks. Now I'm setting up the zsh modules and vcs_info for git integration, then defining a function that maps the current hour in JST to a hue range so the prompt colors shift throughout the day—warm oranges and pinks in the morning, yellows and greens at midday, cyans in the afternoon, reds and magentas at dusk, and blues and purples at night. I'm setting up the hue calculation to pick a random value within the time-based range, then debating whether this should update every prompt or stay fixed per session—the user wants it to shift with the time of day, so I should trigger it in precmd to refresh as hours change while still maintaining randomness within each time bracket.

Adding sparkle effect to the directory display...

I'm wondering if 5% probability per character would be better than 8% — on a typical 20-character path that'd give roughly one sparkle, which feels about right for the occasional glimmer effect the user wanted.

For the sparkle itself, I should make it a warm highlight like 255;255;220 instead of plain white to give it that golden shimmer.

Now I'm working on the git remote tracking feature using a vcs_info hook to detect ahead/behind counts...

Writing git status hook... I need to update the hooks list to include the new `git-remote-status` function, but I also need to be careful about how the `misc` field is being set—the existing `git-untracked` hook uses assignment instead of append, so I should either switch both to `+=` or reorder the hooks to avoid overwriting. I'm realizing `hook_com[misc]` starts empty, so using `+=` is safe. I want to switch to `git rev-list --count` instead of piping through `wc -l` for cleaner output when checking commits ahead and behind. For the time formatting, I should use `strftime` with an explicit timezone to ensure consistent behavior across different systems.

Now I'm thinking about whether `strftime` respects the TZ environment variable in zsh — it does, so I can set `TZ=Asia/Tokyo` before calling it. I should update the hue on every precmd so the color shifts as time changes, giving each prompt a slightly different tint within the time period's range. For the sparkle effect, the user mentioned "キラッと" which suggests a glint or momentary flash rather than constant random characters.

Writing the gradient function... I'm realizing the sparkle position should shift with each prompt render since `_gradient_dir` runs in `precmd` before every display, creating a natural twinkling effect as you type. Rather than pure white, I should tint the sparkle with the current hue at maximum brightness so it looks like the existing color is glinting instead of appearing as a random bright spot.

For the timezone, since the user is on macOS in Japan, I'll set `TZ=Asia/Tokyo` to be explicit. Now I'm ready to write out the complete modified `.zshrc` section with all the gradient and git integration logic.

Writing the zsh configuration... 時間帯ごとの色相範囲を設定していて、昼間は黄色から緑、午後はシアン、夕方は赤からマゼンタ、夜間は青から紫へと遷移するようにしている。最後にランダムな値を加えて、その時間帯内での具体的な色相を決定している。

次に色相をRGB値に変換する関数があり、その後はディレクトリ文字列をグラデーション効果で着色する処理に移っていて、キラッと光る効果を約30%の確率で1文字に加える仕組みを実装している。

ループで各文字を処理し、キラッと効果の対象文字は高輝度で、それ以外は色相に基づいたグラデーション色で着色していく。

Now I'm thinking through the vcs_info configuration changes needed for git remote status display. I need to hook into the git system, modify how untracked files are handled, and add a function to show remote tracking status. The format string already has a misc field that can display both untracked indicators and remote status arrows together, so they should blend naturally without needing extra separators.

Writing the remote status function...

Now I'm thinking through the implementation details—I should create a branch, make these edits, and open a PR. Though I'm second-guessing the sparkle frequency at 30%; it might be showing up too often, but since it's just a single character that shifts position with each prompt, it probably won't be distracting.

For the sparkle formatting, I need to make sure the bold reset doesn't interfere with the colors that follow—using the escape sequence to reset bold while preserving color should work fine. And for the color differentiation the user wanted, just varying the hue range should be subtle enough without needing to adjust saturation or lightness based on time of day.

Now I'm mapping out the exact edits I need to make. There are six blocks to replace: the time-based hue calculation, the gradient with sparkle effect, the git-remote-status hook, the misc variable syntax, the new function for remote status, and the precmd hook update. Let me identify each section precisely so I can make clean replacements. Writing the time-based hue function... I'm modifying the directory coloring function to add a sparkle effect instead of a simple gradient, cycling through hue values as each character is processed. Finishing up the loop that applies the sparkle effect and color gradient to each character, then adding the git-remote-status hook to the vcs_info configuration and adjusting how the git-untracked hook accumulates its output. Finishing the remote status function and then updating precmd to call the time hue function on each prompt, which will give each line a slightly different color based on the current time.

Now I'm implementing everything and need to verify the strftime syntax works correctly—specifically whether the integer declaration will automatically strip the leading zero from the hour value.

Actually, I realize there's a potential issue: if I declare `hour` as an integer with `-i`, assigning a string like "08" could cause zsh to interpret it as octal, which would fail. The safer approach is to capture the hour as a string first, then use the `10#` prefix to force base-10 interpretation when converting to an integer, avoiding any octal parsing problems.

Now I'm thinking through whether setting `TZ` as a prefix to the `strftime` builtin will work in zsh—it should, since zsh allows environment variable assignments before builtins just like it does for external commands. I'm settling on using `TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime` to temporarily override the timezone for that command, which should work reliably in zsh. Now I'll implement the full solution.

input.old_string:

input.new_string:
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# タブごとにランダムな基準色を割り当て（0-360 の色相）
_PROMPT_HUE=$((RANDOM % 360))

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
    _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
bindkey -e

# zplugの設定
source ~/.zplug/init.zsh

# 必要なプラグイン
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-completions"
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search"
zplug "Jxck/dotfiles", as:command, use:"bin/{histuniq,color}"

_gradient_dir() {

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で1文字だけ高輝度に光る
  local -i sparkle_pos=-1
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % len + 1 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( i == sparkle_pos )); then
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;255;230m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
    _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

zplug "zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search"
zplug "Jxck/dotfiles", as:command, use:"bin/{histuniq,color}"
zplug "tcnksm/docker-alias", use:zshrc
zplug "k4rthik/git-cal", as:command, frozen:1
zplug "lib/clipboard", from:oh-my-zsh, if:"[[ $OSTYPE == *darwin* ]]"
zplug "jhawthorn/fzy", as:command, rename-to:fzy, hook-build:"make && sudo make install"
zplug "b4b4r07/enhancd", at:v1
zplug "mollifier/anyframe", at:4c23cb60
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting", defer:2
# git-prompt.zsh は不要（vcs_info でブランチ名を表示）
# zplug "~/.zsh", from:local

# プラグインのインストール
if ! zplug check --verbose; then
  printf "Install? [y/N]: "
  if read -q; then
    echo
    zplug install
  fi
fi

zplug load

# キーバインド設定
bindkey '\eOA' history-substring-search-up
bindkey '\eOB' history-substring-search-down
bindkey '^p' history-beginning-search-backward-end
bindkey '^n' history-beginning-search-forward-end
bindkey '^[[A' up-line-or-search
bindkey '^[[B' down-line-or-search

# 履歴検索の設定
autoload history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-backward-end history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-forward-end history-search-end

# Rust
if [ -d $HOME/.cargo ]; then
  source $HOME/.cargo/env
fi

# Aliases
if [ -f $HOME/.aliases ]; then
  . $HOME/.aliases
fi

# Python (pyenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.pyenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/shims:$PATH"
fi

export PATH=${0:A:h}/bin:$PATH

# direnv
eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"

# SSH補完
function _ssh {
  compadd $(fgrep 'Host ' ~/.ssh/*.config | awk '{print $2}' | sort)
}

# poetry
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"


# Node.js (nodenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.nodenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.nodenv/bin:$PATH"
  eval "$(nodenv init -)"
fi

# atuin (シェル履歴管理)
if [ -f $HOME/.cargo/bin/atuin ]; then
  eval "$(atuin init zsh)"
fi

# パス設定
export PATH="/usr/local/opt/libpq/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/bin:$PATH"

# jenv
export PATH="$HOME/.jenv/bin:$PATH"
eval "$(jenv init -)"


# SDKMAN
export SDKMAN_DIR="$HOME/.sdkman"
[[ -s "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh" ]] && source "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"

# asdf
. /opt/homebrew/opt/asdf/libexec/asdf.sh

export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$HOME/.local/lib:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH"

# opencode
export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"

# bun completions
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"

# Google Cloud SDK
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/path.zsh.inc"
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/completion.zsh.inc"

# claude-mem (memory service for Claude Code)
alias claude-mem="$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun $HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"

lines: # vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える

content.text: **4. untracked の misc フィールドを `+=` に変更（remote-status と共存させるため）**

input.old_string: hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
input.new_string: hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'

content.content: The file /Users/letusfly85/work/letusfly85/dotfiles/.zshrc has been updated successfully.

toolUseResult.oldString: hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
toolUseResult.newString: hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'
toolUseResult.originalFile:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で1文字だけ高輝度に光る
  local -i sparkle_pos=-1
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % len + 1 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( i == sparkle_pos )); then
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;255;230m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked git-remote-status

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# プラグインのインストール

fi

zplug load

# キーバインド設定
bindkey '\eOA' history-substring-search-up

bindkey '^p' history-beginning-search-backward-end

bindkey '^[[A' up-line-or-search

autoload history-search-end

zle -N history-beginning-search-forward-end history-search-end

# Rust

  source $HOME/.cargo/env
fi

# Aliases
if [ -f $HOME/.aliases ]; then
  . $HOME/.aliases
fi

# Python (pyenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.pyenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/shims:$PATH"

export PATH=${0:A:h}/bin:$PATH

# direnv
eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"

# SSH補完

# poetry

# Node.js (nodenv)

lines: && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then

content.text: **5. リモートブランチ差分表示の関数を追加**

input.new_string:
# リモートブランチとの差分（↑push待ち ↓pull待ち）
+vi-git-remote-status() {
  local -i ahead behind
  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
  local arrows=""
  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  _prompt_time_hue
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}

export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$HOME/.local/lib:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH"

# opencode
export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"

# bun completions
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"

# Google Cloud SDK
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/path.zsh.inc"
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/completion.zsh.inc"

# claude-mem (memory service for Claude Code)
alias claude-mem="$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun $HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"

file.content:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で1文字だけ高輝度に光る
  local -i sparkle_pos=-1
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % len + 1 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( i == sparkle_pos )); then
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;255;230m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked git-remote-status

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

file.content:
}

# リモートブランチとの差分（↑push待ち ↓pull待ち）
+vi-git-remote-status() {
  local -i ahead behind
  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
  local arrows=""
  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  _prompt_time_hue
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
bindkey -e

# zplugの設定
source ~/.zplug/init.zsh

# 必要なプラグイン

+      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;255;230m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
+    else
+      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
+      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
+    fi
   done
   _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
 }
@@ -51,7 +81,7 @@ zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
 zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
 
 # vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
-zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked
+zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked git-remote-status
 
 # conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
 +vi-git-branch-color() {
@@ -75,11 +105,23 @@ zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked
 +vi-git-untracked() {
   if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
      && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
-    hook_com[misc]='%F{red}?'
+    hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'
   fi
 }
 
+# リモートブランチとの差分（↑push待ち ↓pull待ち）
++vi-git-remote-status() {
+  local -i ahead behind
+  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
+  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
+  local arrows=""
+  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
+  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
+  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
+}
+
 _prompt_precmd() {
+  _prompt_time_hue
   vcs_info
   _gradient_dir
 }

gh pr create --title "feat: zshrc プロンプトに時間帯カラーテーマ・キラッと効果・リモート差分表示を追加" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- ディレクトリのグラデーション色相をJST時間帯（朝/昼/午後/夕方/夜）に応じて変化させ、各帯域内でランダム選択することで飽きない色味を実現
- 約30%の確率で1文字だけキラッと高輝度（warm white）に光るスパークル効果を追加
- `vcs_info` hook で upstream ブランチとの ahead/behind を `↑N`（push待ち）`↓N`（pull待ち）の矢印で表示

## 変更詳細

### 1. 時間帯ベースカラーテーマ
| 時間帯 | JST | 色相範囲 | イメージ |
|--------|-----|---------|---------|
| 朝 | 5-9時 | 15°-55° | 暖かい朝焼けオレンジ〜ピンク |
| 昼 | 9-13時 | 55°-140° | 陽光の黄色〜緑 |
| 午後 | 13-17時 | 140°-210° | 爽やかな緑〜シアン |
| 夕方 | 17-20時 | 300°-360° | 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ |
| 夜 | 20-5時 | 220°-300° | 夜空の青〜紫 |

- `zsh/datetime` モジュールで fork なしに現在時刻を取得（`strftime` + `$EPOCHSECONDS`）
- 毎プロンプトで `_prompt_time_hue` を呼び出し、時間帯の範囲内でランダムに色相を選択

### 2. キラッと効果（スパークル）
- 各プロンプト描画時に約30%の確率で発動
- パス文字列中のランダムな1文字が bold + warm white (255;255;230) で描画
- プロンプトごとに位置が変わるため、チカチカ光るような視覚効果

### 3. リモートブランチ差分表示
- `+vi-git-remote-status` hook を追加
- `git rev-list --count` で upstream との差分を算出
- `↑N`（緑: push すべきコミット）、`↓N`（赤: pull すべきコミット）をブランチ情報の横に表示
- upstream が設定されていないブランチでは表示しない

## Test plan
- [ ] 新しいターミナルタブを開いてプロンプトが正常に表示されることを確認
- [ ] ディレクトリ部分にグラデーションが表示され、時間帯に応じた色味であることを確認

- [ ] git リポジトリ内でブランチ名が表示されることを確認
- [ ] ローカルで未 push のコミットがある場合に `↑N` が緑で表示されることを確認
- [ ] リモートに未 pull のコミットがある場合に `↓N` が赤で表示されることを確認
- [ ] upstream のないブランチで矢印が表示されないことを確認

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR を作成しました: https://github.com/letusfly85/dotfiles/pull/38

### 変更内容のまとめ

**1. 時間帯ベースのグラデーションカラー**
- JSTの時間帯に応じて色相の範囲が変わります
  - 朝(5-9時): オレンジ〜ピンク（朝焼け）
  - 昼(9-13時): 黄〜緑（陽光）
  - 午後(13-17時): 緑〜シアン（爽やか）
  - 夕方(17-20時): 赤〜マゼンタ（夕焼け）
  - 夜(20-5時): 青〜紫（夜空）
- 各時間帯の範囲内でランダムに色相を選ぶので、毎回微妙に違う色味になります
- `zsh/datetime` の `strftime` を使っているので、外部コマンドの fork なしで高速です

**2. キラッと効果（スパークル）**
- 約30%の確率でパス文字列中のランダムな1文字が bold + warm white で光ります
- プロンプトを表示するたびに位置が変わるので、自然なキラキラ感です

**3. リモートブランチ差分表示**
- upstream が設定されているブランチで `↑N`（緑: push待ち）/ `↓N`（赤: pull待ち）を表示します
- 例: `~/work/project (feat/new-feature+!?↑2↓1) $`

content.thinking:
The user is saying the sparkle effect doesn't look like a "sparkle" - it just looks like a white character. I need to think about how to make it more visually striking as a "sparkle" or "glint" effect.

The current implementation just makes one character bold + warm white (255;255;230). That would indeed just look like a slightly brighter/white character, not really a "sparkle."

To make it more sparkle-like, I could:

1. Add a star/sparkle unicode character (like ✨ or ✦ or ⭐) around the character
2. Use a combination of the character with surrounding bright characters


3. Make the sparkle character stand out more with a different approach

In a terminal environment, I'm pretty limited, but I could wrap the character with unicode sparkle symbols like `✦` or `·`, use pure white with bold for maximum contrast, or add a glow effect by brightening the adjacent characters too. The most effective approach would probably be combining a unicode sparkle character with the original character to create that visual pop.

The challenge is that adding extra characters changes the visual length and could throw off the prompt width calculation. Using combining characters like `c⃰` would overlay a mark on top without affecting the character count, which might be the cleanest solution for a terminal environment. I'm settling on a 3-character glow effect where the center sparkle is bright gold or white, and the adjacent characters get a lighter tint to create a shine that radiates outward. Let me code this up.

Writing the sparkle logic... Writing the color gradient loop... I'm overcomplicating this. Let me step back and think about what "キラッと" actually means—that brief, momentary glint when light catches something. The effect should be quick and noticeable, so maybe I should use a visible sparkle character like `✦` mixed in occasionally rather than trying to layer multiple color variations. I'm reconsidering the approach—instead of just adjusting the glow, I should use a more vibrant gold color (255, 215, 0) for much stronger contrast, expand the glow to 3-5 characters wide, and implement this as a cleaner function that applies the sparkle effect to the directory string.

Writing the gradient function... Writing the sparkle effect logic... Completing the HSL to RGB conversion logic...

I'm weighing whether to keep the glow effect tied to the gradient color or simplify it with fixed pastel tones, but the dynamic approach feels more cohesive even if it adds complexity. I'll stick with the helper function that brightens the hue values for the surrounding characters.

Actually, I'm reconsidering the whole approach—what if I use Unicode combining characters instead? I could overlay a combining asterisk or star above the sparkle character itself, which would give it visual emphasis without changing the actual text content. Let me explore using combining diacritical marks like U+20F0 to add that extra visual pop.

But combining characters might not render consistently across all fonts, even with Cica. I think the simpler approach of making the sparkle character itself bold and bright gold is more reliable. Let me just implement the 3-character glow effect properly and move forward.

file.content:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で1文字だけ高輝度に光る
  local -i sparkle_pos=-1
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % len + 1 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( i == sparkle_pos )); then
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;255;230m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換（S=70%, L=65% 固定）
_hue2rgb() {
  local -F h=$1 s=0.70 l=0.65
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で1文字だけ高輝度に光る
  local -i sparkle_pos=-1
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % len + 1 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( i == sparkle_pos )); then
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;255;230m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked git-remote-status

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

# リモートブランチとの差分（↑push待ち ↓pull待ち）
+vi-git-remote-status() {
  local -i ahead behind
  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
  local arrows=""
  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  _prompt_time_hue
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
bindkey -e

# zplugの設定
source ~/.zplug/init.zsh

# 必要なプラグイン
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-completions"
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search"
zplug "Jxck/dotfiles", as:command, use:"bin/{histuniq,color}"
zplug "tcnksm/docker-alias", use:zshrc
zplug "k4rthik/git-cal", as:command, frozen:1
zplug "lib/clipboard", from:oh-my-zsh, if:"[[ $OSTYPE == *darwin* ]]"
zplug "jhawthorn/fzy", as:command, rename-to:fzy, hook-build:"make && sudo make install"
zplug "b4b4r07/enhancd", at:v1
zplug "mollifier/anyframe", at:4c23cb60
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting", defer:2
# git-prompt.zsh は不要（vcs_info でブランチ名を表示）
# zplug "~/.zsh", from:local

# プラグインのインストール
if ! zplug check --verbose; then
  printf "Install? [y/N]: "
  if read -q; then
    echo
    zplug install
  fi
fi

zplug load

# キーバインド設定
bindkey '\eOA' history-substring-search-up
bindkey '\eOB' history-substring-search-down
bindkey '^p' history-beginning-search-backward-end
bindkey '^n' history-beginning-search-forward-end
bindkey '^[[A' up-line-or-search
bindkey '^[[B' down-line-or-search

# 履歴検索の設定
autoload history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-backward-end history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-forward-end history-search-end

# Rust
if [ -d $HOME/.cargo ]; then
  source $HOME/.cargo/env
fi

# Aliases
if [ -f $HOME/.aliases ]; then
  . $HOME/.aliases
fi

# Python (pyenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.pyenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/shims:$PATH"
fi

export PATH=${0:A:h}/bin:$PATH

# direnv
eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"

# SSH補完
function _ssh {
  compadd $(fgrep 'Host ' ~/.ssh/*.config | awk '{print $2}' | sort)
}

# poetry
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"


# Node.js (nodenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.nodenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.nodenv/bin:$PATH"
  eval "$(nodenv init -)"
fi

# atuin (シェル履歴管理)
if [ -f $HOME/.cargo/bin/atuin ]; then
  eval "$(atuin init zsh)"
fi

# パス設定
export PATH="/usr/local/opt/libpq/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/bin:$PATH"

# jenv
export PATH="$HOME/.jenv/bin:$PATH"
eval "$(jenv init -)"


# SDKMAN
export SDKMAN_DIR="$HOME/.sdkman"
[[ -s "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh" ]] && source "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"

# asdf
. /opt/homebrew/opt/asdf/libexec/asdf.sh

export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$HOME/.local/lib:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH"

# opencode
export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"

# bun completions
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"

# Google Cloud SDK
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/path.zsh.inc"
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/completion.zsh.inc"

# claude-mem (memory service for Claude Code)
alias claude-mem="$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun $HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"

_gradient_dir() {

  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))

}

    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

# リモートブランチとの差分（↑push待ち ↓pull待ち）
+vi-git-remote-status() {
  local -i ahead behind
  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
  local arrows=""
  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  _prompt_time_hue
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}

file.content:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換
_hue2rgb_hsl() {
  local -F h=$1 s=$2 l=$3
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# 通常のグラデーション色（S=70%, L=65%）
_hue2rgb() { _hue2rgb_hsl $1 0.70 0.65 }

# キラッとグロー用（S=25%, L=88%: 白寄りの明るい色）
_hue2rgb_glow() { _hue2rgb_hsl $1 0.25 0.88 }

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で3文字幅のグロー（中心=ゴールド, 両脇=明るく）
  local -i sparkle_pos=0
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 && len >= 3 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % (len - 2) + 2 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( sparkle_pos > 0 && i == sparkle_pos )); then
      # 中心: bold + 鮮やかなゴールド
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;215;60m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    elif (( sparkle_pos > 0 && (i == sparkle_pos - 1 || i == sparkle_pos + 1) )); then
      # 両脇: グロー（白寄りの明るい色）
      _hue2rgb_glow $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

content.text:
PRに反映しました。改善のポイント:

**Before**: 1文字だけ白色 → ほぼ見えない

**After**: 3文字幅のグロー効果
- **中心**: bold + 鮮やかなゴールド `(255, 215, 60)` — 周囲と明らかに違う金色
- **両脇**: 白寄りの明るいグロー `(S=25%, L=88%)` — グラデーションから自然にフェードアウト

グラデーションの中で `暗い→明るい→ゴールド→明るい→暗い` と3文字分の光の山ができるので、「キラッ」と光っているように見えるはずです。新しいタブを開いて Enter を数回押してみてください。

message.content: 外部ライブラリ依存があってもいいのですが、30% の確率で、常に、キラキラしてるような演出ってできないのですか？

content.thinking:
The user wants a more dynamic sparkle effect - not just a static glow on the prompt, but something that actually "twinkles" or "sparkles" continuously, like an animation. The current implementation only changes when a new prompt is drawn (i.e., when you press Enter).

To make something "constantly" sparkle, we'd need some kind of animation. In a terminal, there are a few approaches:

1. **ANSI blink attribute** - `\e[5m` for slow blink, `\e[6m` for rapid blink. But many terminals don't support this, or it looks ugly (the whole character blinks on/off).


2. **Terminal escape sequences for cursor manipulation** - Periodically redraw parts of the prompt, though this gets complex and fragile.
3. **Using a background process** that periodically redraws the prompt with `zle reset-prompt` triggered by a timer.
4. **Wezterm-specific features** - Wezterm doesn't really support custom shaders or animations for inline text.
5. **Using `TRAPALRM` + `TMOUT`** - Zsh has a `TRAPALRM` signal that fires every `TMOUT` seconds, which we could use to periodically reset the prompt and trigger a re-evaluation of the sparkle effect.

Setting up a timer-based prompt refresh...

The `TRAPALRM` + `TMOUT` approach seems most practical—I'd set a one-second interval that re-randomizes the sparkle position and redraws the prompt each time, creating a twinkling effect where the sparkle moves around based on the 30% probability. One thing to watch: `TMOUT` normally causes the shell to exit after inactivity, but defining `TRAPALRM` prevents that auto-logout behavior, so this should be safe.

The main trade-off is that `zle reset-prompt` fires every second, which redraws the entire prompt—it's a bit CPU-intensive but manageable on modern systems. There's also the edge case where `zle reset-prompt` only works when the user is actively at the command line; if a command is running, the trap still fires but the redraw silently fails, which is fine.

With a 1-second interval and 30% probability of showing a sparkle, the effect creates a genuine twinkling pattern where the sparkle randomly appears and disappears across different positions in the prompt. I should double-check whether `TMOUT` conflicts with other tools like `atuin` that might already be using it...

Actually, `TMOUT` is a standard zsh variable, so conflicts are unlikely unless the user has explicitly set it elsewhere. I also need to make sure `TRAPALRM` doesn't conflict with any existing trap handlers the user might have. The key thing is that when `TRAPALRM` runs and updates `_PROMPT_DIR`, calling `zle reset-prompt` will re-evaluate the prompt string since `PROMPT_SUBST` is enabled, which should properly display the new sparkle position.

Wait, I need to think through the execution context more carefully—when `TRAPALRM` fires, it runs in a specific shell context...

Actually, I think I should only update the sparkle position in the timer, not recalculate the hue every second. The hue is meant to shift based on time of day, not flicker constantly, so calling `_prompt_time_hue` repeatedly would create too much visual noise. But since `_gradient_dir` depends on `_PROMPT_HUE`, I need to make sure that value stays consistent when I'm just updating the sparkle.

Setting up a simple timer with `TMOUT=1` and a `TRAPALRM` handler that calls `_gradient_dir` and refreshes the prompt should work cleanly. Though I'm realizing there could be some edge cases—like if the user is in the middle of typing a long command, the prompt refresh might cause unexpected behavior.

Actually, `zle reset-prompt` only redraws the prompt itself, not the command line, so the typed text should remain untouched. And when a command is actually running, `SIGALRM` fires but there's no zle context to update anyway, so it just silently fails, which is fine.

The main question is whether the timer resets after each alarm fires, or if it keeps counting down continuously...

In zsh, when `TRAPALRM` is defined, the alarm automatically reschedules itself after each trigger. That's actually elegant. I should be careful about `TMOUT` potentially conflicting with other uses though, so I'll add a note about that.

The key insight is that `vcs_info` should never run in the trap—that would be way too expensive, calling git every second. Only the sparkle animation updates on the timer. And for the probability, the user wanted 30% chance per second, which means over a few seconds you'd almost certainly catch at least one sparkle effect.

Writing the implementation now...

Actually, rethinking the user's request: they want the sparkle to continuously animate and twinkle rather than stay static until the next prompt render. So I'll keep the 30% probability per-trigger but make it fire regularly so the effect actually animates. Maybe I'll use two sparkle positions instead of one to get that fuller "キラキラ" shimmer effect.

Implementing the animation now...

local -i ahead behind
  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
  local arrows=""
  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  _prompt_time_hue
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e

input.old_string:
setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
input.new_string:
setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# キラキラアニメーション: 1秒ごとにスパークル位置を更新して再描画
TMOUT=1
TRAPALRM() {
  _gradient_dir
  zle reset-prompt 2>/dev/null
}

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# キラキラアニメーション: 1秒ごとにスパークル位置を更新して再描画
TMOUT=1
TRAPALRM() {
  _gradient_dir
  zle reset-prompt 2>/dev/null
}

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
toolUseResult.originalFile:
# 基本設定
export LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8
export EDITOR=vim
export SAVEHIST=100000

# プロンプト設定（グラデーション付きディレクトリ + git ブランチ/ステータス）
zmodload zsh/mathfunc
zmodload zsh/datetime
autoload -Uz vcs_info add-zsh-hook

# 時間帯ベースの色相範囲（JST）
# 朝(5-9): 暖かい朝焼け, 昼(9-13): 明るい黄緑,
# 午後(13-17): 爽やかシアン, 夕方(17-20): 夕焼けマゼンタ, 夜(20-5): 深い青紫
_prompt_time_hue() {
  local hour_str
  TZ=Asia/Tokyo strftime -s hour_str '%H' $EPOCHSECONDS
  local -i hour=$(( 10#$hour_str ))
  local -i hue_min hue_max
  if (( hour >= 5 && hour < 9 )); then
    hue_min=15; hue_max=55       # 朝焼けのオレンジ〜ピンク
  elif (( hour >= 9 && hour < 13 )); then
    hue_min=55; hue_max=140      # 陽光の黄色〜緑
  elif (( hour >= 13 && hour < 17 )); then
    hue_min=140; hue_max=210     # 午後の緑〜シアン
  elif (( hour >= 17 && hour < 20 )); then
    hue_min=300; hue_max=360     # 夕焼けの赤〜マゼンタ
  else
    hue_min=220; hue_max=300     # 夜空の青〜紫
  fi
  _PROMPT_HUE=$(( hue_min + RANDOM % (hue_max - hue_min + 1) ))
}

# 初回の色相設定
_prompt_time_hue

# HSL の色相を truecolor エスケープ用 R;G;B に変換
_hue2rgb_hsl() {
  local -F h=$1 s=$2 l=$3
  local -F c=$(( (1.0 - fabs(2.0 * l - 1.0)) * s ))
  local -F hp=$(( h / 60.0 ))
  local -F x=$(( c * (1.0 - fabs(fmod(hp, 2.0) - 1.0)) ))
  local -F m=$(( l - c / 2.0 ))
  local -F r=0 g=0 b=0
  if   (( hp < 1 )); then r=$c; g=$x
  elif (( hp < 2 )); then r=$x; g=$c
  elif (( hp < 3 )); then g=$c; b=$x
  elif (( hp < 4 )); then g=$x; b=$c
  elif (( hp < 5 )); then r=$x; b=$c
  else                     r=$c; b=$x
  fi
  REPLY="$(( int((r+m)*255) ));$(( int((g+m)*255) ));$(( int((b+m)*255) ))"
}

# 通常のグラデーション色（S=70%, L=65%）
_hue2rgb() { _hue2rgb_hsl $1 0.70 0.65 }

# キラッとグロー用（S=25%, L=88%: 白寄りの明るい色）
_hue2rgb_glow() { _hue2rgb_hsl $1 0.25 0.88 }

# ディレクトリ文字列をグラデーションで着色（キラッと効果付き）
_gradient_dir() {
  local dir="${(%):-%~}"
  local -i len=${#dir}
  local -F step=$(( len > 1 ? 50.0 / len : 0 ))
  local esc=$'\e'
  # キラッと効果: 約30%の確率で3文字幅のグロー（中心=ゴールド, 両脇=明るく）
  local -i sparkle_pos=0
  (( RANDOM % 100 < 30 && len >= 3 )) && sparkle_pos=$(( RANDOM % (len - 2) + 2 ))
  _PROMPT_DIR=""
  for (( i = 1; i <= len; i++ )); do
    if (( sparkle_pos > 0 && i == sparkle_pos )); then
      # 中心: bold + 鮮やかなゴールド
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[1;38;2;255;215;60m%}${dir[$i]}%{${esc}[22m%}"
    elif (( sparkle_pos > 0 && (i == sparkle_pos - 1 || i == sparkle_pos + 1) )); then
      # 両脇: グロー（白寄りの明るい色）
      _hue2rgb_glow $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    else
      _hue2rgb $(( fmod(_PROMPT_HUE + (i-1) * step, 360.0) ))
      _PROMPT_DIR+="%{${esc}[38;2;${REPLY}m%}${dir[$i]}"
    fi
  done
  _PROMPT_DIR+="%f"
}

# vcs_info: git ブランチ名 + ステータス表示
zstyle ':vcs_info:*' enable git
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' check-for-changes true
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' stagedstr '%F{green}+'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' unstagedstr '%F{yellow}!'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' formats ' %F{cyan}(%b%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'
zstyle ':vcs_info:git:*' actionformats ' %F{cyan}(%b%F{cyan}|%F{red}%a%c%u%m%F{cyan})%f'

# vcs_info hooks: ブランチ色分け + untracked 検出
zstyle ':vcs_info:git*+set-message:*' hooks git-branch-color git-untracked git-remote-status

# conventional branch prefix でブランチ名の色を変える
+vi-git-branch-color() {
  local branch="${hook_com[branch]}"
  local color
  case "$branch" in
    feat/*|feature/*)   color="%F{green}" ;;
    fix/*|bug/*)        color="%F{red}" ;;
    hotfix/*)           color="%F{magenta}" ;;
    docs/*)             color="%F{cyan}" ;;
    chore/*)            color="%F{yellow}" ;;
    refactor/*)         color="%F{blue}" ;;
    test/*)             color="%F{white}" ;;
    main|master|develop) color="%F{green}" ;;
    *)                  color="%F{blue}" ;;
  esac
  hook_com[branch]="${color}${branch}"
}

# untracked ファイルの検出（? 表示）
+vi-git-untracked() {
  if [[ $(command git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null) == 'true' ]] \
     && command git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | command grep -q '^??'; then
    hook_com[misc]+='%F{red}?'
  fi
}

# リモートブランチとの差分（↑push待ち ↓pull待ち）
+vi-git-remote-status() {
  local -i ahead behind
  ahead=$(command git rev-list --count @{upstream}..HEAD 2>/dev/null) || return
  behind=$(command git rev-list --count HEAD..@{upstream} 2>/dev/null) || return
  local arrows=""
  (( ahead > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{green}↑${ahead}"
  (( behind > 0 )) && arrows+="%F{red}↓${behind}"
  [[ -n "$arrows" ]] && hook_com[misc]+="${arrows}"
}

_prompt_precmd() {
  _prompt_time_hue
  vcs_info
  _gradient_dir
}
add-zsh-hook precmd _prompt_precmd

setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='${_PROMPT_DIR}${vcs_info_msg_0_} $ '

# To Enable Ctrl+a, Ctrl+e
bindkey -e

# zplugの設定
source ~/.zplug/init.zsh

# 必要なプラグイン
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-completions"
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search"
zplug "Jxck/dotfiles", as:command, use:"bin/{histuniq,color}"
zplug "tcnksm/docker-alias", use:zshrc
zplug "k4rthik/git-cal", as:command, frozen:1
zplug "lib/clipboard", from:oh-my-zsh, if:"[[ $OSTYPE == *darwin* ]]"
zplug "jhawthorn/fzy", as:command, rename-to:fzy, hook-build:"make && sudo make install"
zplug "b4b4r07/enhancd", at:v1
zplug "mollifier/anyframe", at:4c23cb60
zplug "zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting", defer:2
# git-prompt.zsh は不要（vcs_info でブランチ名を表示）
# zplug "~/.zsh", from:local

# プラグインのインストール
if ! zplug check --verbose; then
  printf "Install? [y/N]: "
  if read -q; then
    echo
    zplug install
  fi
fi

zplug load

# キーバインド設定
bindkey '\eOA' history-substring-search-up
bindkey '\eOB' history-substring-search-down
bindkey '^p' history-beginning-search-backward-end
bindkey '^n' history-beginning-search-forward-end
bindkey '^[[A' up-line-or-search
bindkey '^[[B' down-line-or-search

# 履歴検索の設定
autoload history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-backward-end history-search-end
zle -N history-beginning-search-forward-end history-search-end

# Rust
if [ -d $HOME/.cargo ]; then
  source $HOME/.cargo/env
fi

# Aliases
if [ -f $HOME/.aliases ]; then
  . $HOME/.aliases
fi

# Python (pyenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.pyenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/shims:$PATH"
fi

export PATH=${0:A:h}/bin:$PATH

# direnv
eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"

# SSH補完
function _ssh {
  compadd $(fgrep 'Host ' ~/.ssh/*.config | awk '{print $2}' | sort)
}

# poetry
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"


# Node.js (nodenv)
if [ -d $HOME/.nodenv ]; then
  export PATH="$HOME/.nodenv/bin:$PATH"
  eval "$(nodenv init -)"
fi

# atuin (シェル履歴管理)
if [ -f $HOME/.cargo/bin/atuin ]; then
  eval "$(atuin init zsh)"
fi

# パス設定
export PATH="/usr/local/opt/libpq/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@17/bin:$PATH"

# jenv
export PATH="$HOME/.jenv/bin:$PATH"
eval "$(jenv init -)"


# SDKMAN
export SDKMAN_DIR="$HOME/.sdkman"
[[ -s "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh" ]] && source "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"

# asdf
. /opt/homebrew/opt/asdf/libexec/asdf.sh

export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$HOME/.local/lib:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH"

# opencode
export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"

# bun completions
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"

# Google Cloud SDK
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/path.zsh.inc"
source "/opt/homebrew/share/google-cloud-sdk/completion.zsh.inc"

# claude-mem (memory service for Claude Code)
alias claude-mem="$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun $HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"
